raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr tahs Eekchas /
un tahs Kahjas buhs winnam
ar Uhdeni masgaht / un tam
Preesteram buhs to wiſfu uppup-
reht un eededsinaht us to Altari/
fchts irr weens Dedsains-Uppurs/
weens Ugguns par faldn Smar-
schu tam KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ja winna Uppurs
preeksch ta KUNGA weens De-
dfains-Uppurs no Putneem irr/
tad buhs winnam fawu Uppuri
no Uhbelehm / jeb no jauneem
Balloscheem tam KUNGAM
peenest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un taim Preesteram buhs
to pee ta Altara nest / un winna
Galwu ar Naggu nokneebt / un
us to Altareededsinaht/ un win-
na Affinim buhs pee ta Altara
Seenas isspaiditam tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Kugſni ar fa-
wahn Spalwahn buhs tam at-
xeht/ un to pee ta Altara prett
Rihiteemus to Pelna Kohpu mest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo prohjam buhs tam to
ar fatveem Spahrneem schelt /
ne dalkiht / un tam Preesteram
buhs to us to Altari eededsinaht/
us to Matku/ kas wirs to Uggu-
ni irr / tas irr weens Dedsams-
Uppurs/ weens Ugguns par fal-
du Smartschu tam KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "A nit kas labb
nu Ehdannu-
tam KUNGQ
peeneft/ tad buhs winna-
ram no Kweeschu-Miltee
un taim buhs Etji pah-
un Wihraku us to lift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winnam buhs
Aarona Dehleem/ teem
reem nest / tad buhs ta
Sauju no teem Kwees-
teem/ un no winna Etje-
fin winna Wihraku remt
Preesteram buhs winna
neschanas-Uppuri us te-
eededsinaht / tas irr we-
guns par faldu Smars-
KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas atteek no t-
ma-Uppura / peederr Q
un winna Dehleem/ tas-
na itt swehta Swehtib-
KUNGA Uggunim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja tu weenu E-
Uppuri no Zepta eefsch Je-
bi peeneft/ tad lai tas irr-
dsetas Karraschas no Ki-
Milteem/ ar Etji fajaukt-
neraudsetas Rauschas
aptraipitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja taws Uppur-
Ehdams-Uppurs irr
zepts/ tad buhs tam no-
dseteim Kweeschu-Milt-
Etji fajaukteem buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Grees to Gabbal-
leij tur Etji wirfu/ tas irr-
Ehdams-Uppurs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja taws Uppur-
Ehdams-Uppurs us Rest-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
